message:
fix(cycle): merge witness/refinery/polecat into one rig ops cycle group

Previously witness/refinery and polecats were separate cycle groups,
so prefix+n/p from gt-witness only cycled to gt-refinery (2 sessions)
and polecats only cycled among polecats. Now all non-crew rig sessions
share one group: witness + refinery + polecats.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
